product.imageAlt: Conquer MD compounded GLP-1 injectable product

card.title: PAIN CREAM
card.description2: Our athlete-safe compounded pain cream is designed to provide rapid, localized relief right where you need it most. This compounded cream combines ketoprofen, baclofen, menthol, NAD+, and L-carnitine in a topical formula. Designed to provide localized support for sore muscles and joints, offering a cooling effect from menthol and gentle comfort from its blended ingredients. Together, these ingredients work to help you stay active and recover with confidence.
card.finePrint: No membership required. We bill & ship quarterly and you can cancel your subscription at any time. Due to state regulations we cannot ship test...

benefits.title: Multi-ingredient blend

benefits.title: Compounded for active living
benefits.description: Developed with safety and performance in mind.

splitContent.title: Pain Relief, Redefined
splitContent.subTitle: Ideal for sore joints, muscle aches, and overuse injuries. This topical provides targeted support whether you’re recovering from activity or managing daily discomfort.
features: Combines anti-inflammatory, muscle relaxant, and numbing agents
Helps calm localized tension and stiffness
May ease discomfort from overuse or strain

faqs.title: Have Questions? We're Here to Help

items.question: What benefits should I expect to see (and when) using the Pain Cream?
items.answer: You can expect personalized treatment plans, licensed medical support, and continuous follow-up designed around your goals.

items.question: What states can you NOT send pain cream to?
items.answer: Coverage depends on your plan and location. We provide transparent pricing and documentation you can use for reimbursement when eligible.

items.question: What are the potential side effects of using Pain Cream?
items.answer: Yes, many of our services can be paid using HSA/FSA cards. Eligibility may vary by provider and treatment type.

items.question: Do you take FSA/HSA?
items.answer: At the moment, services and fulfillment are focused on approved U.S. regions where our providers are licensed.

items.question: Do you take insurance?
items.answer: Your care team includes qualified clinicians and support staff who guide you through onboarding, treatment, and progress tracking.

items.question: I have another question for you.
items.answer: No problem. Reach out to our support team and we will help you quickly with any additional questions.
